calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp §473(D); And To Quash Service Of Summons (Ccp §418.10)
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ANDREW DILOI'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Pursuant To Ccp §473(D); And To Quash Service Of Summons (Ccp §418.10) is Granted pursuant to plaintiff's statement of non-opposition. Order signed in open court. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb
